accounts.name: Accounts
accounts.description: General accounting: the finance ledger, journals, and financial reports.

accounts-ap.name: Accounts Payable
accounts-ap.description: Supplier bills, purchase invoices, and outgoing payments.

accounts-ar.name: Accounts Receivable
accounts-ar.description: Customer invoices, receipts, and incoming payments.

accounts-viewer.name: Accounts Viewer
accounts-viewer.description: Read-only access to financial records and accounting reports.

auth.name: Authentication & Access
auth.description: User accounts, roles, and access assignment across all apps.

cms.name: Content Management
cms.description: Storefront pages, navigation menus, and marketing content.

crm.name: Customer Relationship Management
crm.description: Contacts, leads, and customer relationship management.

ess.name: Employee Self Service
ess.description: Employee self-service: leave requests, attendance, and personal records.

hr.name: Human Resources
hr.description: Employees, leave approvals, and HR administration.

inventory.name: Inventory
inventory.description: Warehouse stock, bins, batches, expiry, and reconciliation.

manufacturing.name: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Production work orders, recipes, and shop-floor operations.

marketplace.name: Marketplace
marketplace.description: Third-party marketplace integrations: catalog, stock, and orders.

order-management.name: Order Management
order-management.description: Sales order processing, status tracking, and fulfillment.

payroll.name: Payroll
payroll.description: Salary runs, payslips, and payroll processing.

rider.name: Rider
rider.description: Delivery rider assignments and cash-on-delivery collection.

sale.name: Point of Sale
sale.description: In-store POS sales, checkout, and the cash register.

seed.name: Seeding & Setup
seed.description: Data seeding and reference-data setup controls.

social.name: Social
social.description: Social media publishing, syncing, and engagement.

stock.name: Stock
stock.description: Product stock items, barcodes, and stock movement.

web.name: Storefront
web.description: Public online storefront browsing and checkout.

web-user.name: Web Users
web-user.description: Management of registered storefront customer accounts and profiles.
